channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 5 com severidade Alta
• 5 novas CVEs
• 1 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-34612 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.9
Resumo:
Kestra is an open-source, event-driven orchestration platform. Prior to version 1.3.7, Kestra (default docker-compose deployment) contains a SQL Injection vulnerability that leads to Remote Code Execution (RCE) in the following endpoint "GET /api/v1/main/flows/search". Once a user is authenticated, simply visiting a crafted link is enough to trigger the vulnerability. The injected payload is executed by PostgreSQL us...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34612
 
📰 32 Degrees Cool Women's Stretch Twill Cropped Ankle Pants - 4-Way Stretch, Elastic Waist, Patch Pockets - aplusme.me
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Elastic, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxNM1N6ZnBGQXVQenZCZmRHVGJ5WWZlTWZhRGlDSGVIaGJFaTJoRU1WNkdpcFBlMEVEWTdNN1dJaFZYZ2thVzFSandPY1gtMGlvWGN3ZkF5bTlwMmk0Z3pXSkg4S3ZIOFNvN3RQLWUzNk01alJMSHB2di1adkZNMXczeGNha2ZYWlY1Z21TX3BCemFnZ1VjeGFsd3ByTQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 Agent Val’s AI-Led Exploit Validation Could Be A Game Changer For Qualys (QLYS) - simplywall.st
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Qualys. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Die Linke German political party confirms data stolen by Qilin ransomware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Qilin ransomware group has claimed responsibility for an attack against Die Linke ('The Left'), forcing an IT systems outage at the political party, and threatening sensitive data leak.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/die-linke-german-political-party-confirms-data-stolen-by-qilin-ransomware/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-26135 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.6
Resumo:
Server-side request forgery (ssrf) in Azure Custom Locations Resource Provider (RP) allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26135
 
🚨 CVE-2026-4350 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The Perfmatters plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file deletion via path traversal in all versions up to, and including, 2.5.9.1. This is due to the `PMCS::action_handler()` method processing the `$_GET['delete']` parameter without any sanitization, authorization check, or nonce verification. The unsanitized filename is concatenated with the storage directory path and passed to `unlink()`. This makes it...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4350
 
🚨 CVE-2026-23427 - Ubuntu
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: ksmbd: fix use-after-free in durable v2 replay of active file handles parse_durable_handle_context() unconditionally assigns dh_info->fp->conn to the current connection when handling a DURABLE_REQ_V2 context with SMB2_FLAGS_REPLAY_OPERATION. ksmbd_lookup_fd_cguid() does not filter by fp->conn, so it returns file handles that are already actively conn...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23427
 
🚨 CVE-2025-13368 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Xpro Addons — 140+ Widgets for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the Pricing Widget's 'onClick Event' setting in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.20 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whe...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-13368
 
📰 Mounting Challenges for Hims & Hers: Legal Probes and Data Breach Cloud Outlook - AD HOC NEWS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxNQlVWUzA0QWttVmNOemRJeUFJenNXZWlLODNsMVliWnZ5emxzbm1HYzJxaUlfTDBaU1hUV3hKT3dkLW9YbVpsT3R2cHFDWm5Sdmh1Z3lHZU9NLVh5eXRNZVljeXBGWVp0czVVTDJiMGJ1QklVVjBXMHBDSnRUMHYxMUg2VXdzV3BZaUZTMGFOQVZxeDZnaGV5d0haUWljOWFob2dVMmx4VEFtSEhlckVmSHQ0RHVUQzlsV21KbThyR3Vock0?oc=5
 
📰 Canadian man charged with terrorism after machete attack at Kenya mosque - Rocky Mountain Outlook
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxPSk1Jd3pjdGY0VExCX0gzUkRGMTZKVXYxNkdMa1NfZDhVOEJ5TkZlU0lGakhwZnpXRzRRVjE1YUxMYkp3eHV4VXN6VGZXOE85Y1J2N24zNGpKQ19NSHhiVkJVZVFtMU9vZWFiVXJKZlFtRWFVRVl0QlI1OFhxbTNndnNGbkFEcnNMSGo1dnF6MDdVdkN4dVZfNVBLRGNFbDhSanJpeVJyNTFfaUxHNkpaLUIxNG9XUnE4R0J2TzNn?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 02/04/2026 até 04/04/2026.
